recommendations.overview: An irritable marketing executive, Neal Page, is heading home to Chicago for Thanksgiving when a number of delays force him to travel with a well meaning but overbearing shower curtain ring salesman, Del Griffith.

recommendations.title: She's Having a Baby

recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: Love Don't Co$t a Thing
recommendations.overview: A high school outcast pays a cheerleader to pose as his girlfriend so he can be considered cool.
